headline: Ford, GM, Stellantis stock prices declined for week ending March 13
summary: Stock prices for the Detroit Three were down as the auto industry and stock markets continued dealing with the fallout from the U.S.-Iran war.

headline: An Interesting Big Name Is Betting on a Stellantis Turnaround -- Should You?
summary: Investors sometimes follow big-name investments, and used-car juggernaut Carvana is buying Stellantis brick-and-mortar dealerships.
